title: cymbidium bicolor subsp. pubescens
intro: Cymbidium bicolor subsp. pubescens, also known as the Bicolored Cymbidium, is a species of orchid native to the subtropical regions of China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium bicolor subsp. pubescens include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
